Operation 'getV1AlertChannels' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. The original summary and description are identical and overly simplistic. They lack context about what alert channels are, what parameters are available for filtering/pagination, and what the response contains. An AI agent needs to understand the purpose of alert channels, available filtering options, and the structure of returned data to effectively use this operation. The improved version adds domain context, explains the operation's purpose, references parameter support, and describes the response structure.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all alert channels configured in your Checkly account. Alert channels are destinations where alerts and notifications are sent (e.g., email, Slack, PagerDuty). Supports filtering and pagination via query parameters. Returns an array of alert channel objects with their configuration details and status.
data.reasoning: The original summary and description are identical and overly simplistic. They lack context about what alert channels are, what parameters are available for filtering/pagination, and what the response contains. An AI agent needs to understand the purpose of alert channels, available filtering options, and the structure of returned data to effectively use this operation. The improved version adds domain context, explains the operation's purpose, references parameter support, and describes the response structure.

message: Operation 'getV1Checks' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. The description is too minimal and doesn't explain the 9 available parameters or what the response contains. Added details about pagination, filtering capabilities, and return value to help AI agents understand filtering options and response structure.

data.current_description: Lists all current checks in your account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all checks in your account. Supports filtering by check type, status, and tags. Returns an array of Check objects with their configuration and current status. Supports pagination via limit and offset parameters.
data.reasoning: The description is too minimal and doesn't explain the 9 available parameters or what the response contains. Added details about pagination, filtering capabilities, and return value to help AI agents understand filtering options and response structure.

message: Operation 'postV1Checks' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks detail about inputs (CheckInput schema), outputs (returns Check with ID), and side effects (check becomes active). Enhanced to clarify what configuration is needed, what is returned, and that the check starts monitoring immediately.

data.current_description: Creates a new check in your account.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new check in your account with the provided configuration. Accepts a CheckInput object containing check type, endpoints, frequency, and alert settings. Returns the created Check object with an assigned ID. The check will be immediately active and begin monitoring according to its schedule.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about inputs (CheckInput schema), outputs (returns Check with ID), and side effects (check becomes active). Enhanced to clarify what configuration is needed, what is returned, and that the check starts monitoring immediately.

message: Operation 'getV1ChecksById' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is repetitive and provides no additional context. Added information about what is returned (complete Check object with status and monitoring details) and clarified the required path parameter for AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific check by its ID. Returns the complete Check object including configuration, current status, and monitoring details. Requires the check ID as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Description is repetitive and provides no additional context. Added information about what is returned (complete Check object with status and monitoring details) and clarified the required path parameter for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'putV1ChecksById' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is minimal and repetitive. Added clarity about accepting CheckInput, partial update support, return value, and that changes take effect immediately. This helps AI agents understand update behavior and side effects.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing check's configuration by ID. Accepts a CheckInput object with updated settings. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated Check object. Changes take effect immediately and affect ongoing monitoring.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and repetitive. Added clarity about accepting CheckInput, partial update support, return value, and that changes take effect immediately. This helps AI agents understand update behavior and side effects.

message: Operation 'deleteV1ChecksById' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too brief and doesn't explain the permanent nature of deletion or side effects. Added context about permanent removal, immediate cessation of monitoring, data deletion, and response code to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a check by ID, permanently removing it from your account. The check will stop monitoring immediately and all associated data will be removed. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion.
data.reasoning: Description is too brief and doesn't explain the permanent nature of deletion or side effects. Added context about permanent removal, immediate cessation of monitoring, data deletion, and response code to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all check groups in your account. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Returns an array of CheckGroup objects containing group configuration, member checks, and alert settings.
data.reasoning: Description is repetitive and provides no context about parameters or response structure. Added information about pagination, filtering/sorting capabilities, and what CheckGroup objects contain to improve AI agent understanding of available options and response format.
